subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.12
question_html:
What is the molecular geometry of SF4?

A.  Tetrahedral

B.  Trigonal bipyramidal

C.  See-saw

D.  Square planar
examiners_html: 54% of the candidates deduced the molecular geometry of SF4. The distractors were chosen with equal frequency by the rest of the candidates. This question discriminated well between high-scoring and low-scoring candidates.
